summary: Learn how to log in to Pronouncly using Google, access the available courses, and select your Japanese learning level to begin your language journey.
title_options: Getting Started with Pronouncly in minutes

scenes.purpose: Click Google Login on the landing page to start authentication.
scenes.spoken_line: Click the Google login action to begin from the landing page.
scenes.source_excerpt: Hey. So we are launching Pronouncely. It's an AI powered land language learning platform. So to get started, first, you need to go on the Google login button that's on the top right. Once you click it, just you you need to create an account or you can log in with the existing one.

scenes.purpose: Continue with Google to move forward with the existing account sign-in flow.
scenes.spoken_line: Continue with Google to sign in with the existing account.
scenes.source_excerpt: Since I've already created the account, I'll log in to the existing one. After log in, you can see the five courses. Right now, we have opened the Japan courses, and the rest of the four courses are coming soon. So under Japan click on the Japan courses.
